source_name: Practice Directive 2/2017 (Revised) - Notification of Change in the Business Address (including Branches) and/or Nature of Business
part: NOTIFICATION OF CHANGES IN THE BUSINESS ADDRESS
section: NOTIFICATION OF CHANGES IN THE BUSINESS ADDRESS
section_title: NOTIFICATION OF CHANGES IN THE BUSINESS ADDRESS
content: (INCLUDING BRANCHES) AND/OR NATURE OF BUSINESS This Practice Directive is issued pursuant to section 20C of the Companies Commission of Malaysia Act 2001 and section 610 of the Companies Act 2016.

source_name: Practice Directive 2/2017 (Revised) - Notification of Change in the Business Address (including Branches) and/or Nature of Business
content: 1. This Practice Directive serves to clarify the mechanism for the notification of change in the business address (including branches) and/or nature of business of a company in relation to any changes made subsequent to the incorporation of a company under section 14(3)(c) or during a calendar year, where applicable.

source_name: Practice Directive 2/2017 (Revised) - Notification of Change in the Business Address (including Branches) and/or Nature of Business
content: 2. Currently, a company intending to change its business address (including branches) and/or nature of business can only notify SSM of such changes through the lodgement of Annual Return.

source_name: Practice Directive 2/2017 (Revised) - Notification of Change in the Business Address (including Branches) and/or Nature of Business
content: 18 April 2017 (Revised: 3 December 2018) 3. Nevertheless, SSM is aware of the need and urgency of the information pertaining to the changes in the business address (including branches) and/or the nature of business and be reflected as part of the company's profile due to the requirements of some other authorities.

source_name: Practice Directive 2/2017 (Revised) - Notification of Change in the Business Address (including Branches) and/or Nature of Business
content: 4. Where a company has resolved to change its business address (including branches) or its nature of business, the company is required to notify SSM within 14 days from the date of such change. 5. Notwithstanding paragraph 4, a company limited by guarantee is not allowed to change its nature of business unless otherwise made through an amendment to its constitution. 6. A company is not allowed to state its nature of business as "DORMANT" as the nature of business of a company should be reflective of the type of business activities the company was registered for. Therefore, dormancy is merely the status of a company reflective of its financial statements and not the nature of business for a company. 7. The notification shall be in a form and manner as specified in

source_name: Practice Directive 2/2017 (Revised) - Notification of Change in the Business Address (including Branches) and/or Nature of Business
content: 8. This Practice Directive superseded the Practice Directive 2/2017 issued on 18 April 2017 and the Amendment to the Practice Directive 2/2017 issued on 10 July 2018.
